prd.oneLiner: Connect intake, client profiles, conflict-check status, engagement review, and follow-up work.
prd.goal: Reduce initial consultation response time by 25% and manage intake history consistently.
prd.whyNow: Consultation inquiries, client details, conflict checks, and engagement reviews are separated, making early response and record management inconsistent.
prd.problem: Consultation inquiries, client details, conflict checks, and engagement reviews are separated, making early response and record management inconsistent.
prd.solution: Connect intake, client profiles, conflict-check status, engagement review, and follow-up work.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Law-office staff receiving client consultations
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Consultation inquiries, client details, conflict checks, and engagement reviews are separated, making early response and record management inconsistent.

targets.name: Law-office operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Consultation inquiries, client details, conflict checks, and engagement reviews are separated, making early response and record management inconsistent.

scenarios.text: Law-office staff receiving client consultations completes consultation inquiry and matter-context capture and checks progress.
Law-office operations coordinator reviews consultation-to-engagement conversion and matter-type operations reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Reduce initial consultation response time by 25% and manage intake history consistently.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Client, consultation, conflict-check, and engagement-status lookup
Consultation assignment, conflict check, engagement review, and follow-up management
Consultation-to-engagement conversion and matter-type operations reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
